recent_news.title: CyberSecQwen-4B: Why Defensive Cyber Needs Small, Specialized, Locally-Runnable Models
recent_news.body_text:
Why this matters Why a small specialized model, not just a small model A 5-minute walkthrough Why AMD MI300X The training data The recipe Companion model: same recipe, different substrate Challenges and fixes Try it yourself Intended use What's next Closing Built for the AMD Developer Hackathon · Trained on a single AMD Instinct MI300X · Apache 2.0
Frontier models are very good at very many things
